title: Machine Room Lifts
description: Traditional traction elevators with dedicated machine room. Ideal for high-rise buildings requiring high speeds and heavy capacity.

title: Machine Roomless Lifts
description: Space-saving gearless technology with compact design. Perfect for modern buildings where space optimization is essential.

title: Hydraulic Lifts
description: Smooth hydraulic operation with pitless design. Economical solution for low to mid-rise buildings up to 5 floors.

title: Goods Lifts
description: Heavy-duty industrial elevators designed for material handling. Customizable capacity from 1 to 5 tons.

title: Home Lifts
description: Compact residential elevators for villas and homes. Single-phase power with elegant design options.

title: Hospital Lifts
description: Specialized stretcher elevators for healthcare facilities. Spacious design with smooth operation and safety features.

title: Capsule Lifts
description: Panoramic glass elevators as architectural highlights. Premium design for hotels, malls, and prestigious buildings.

title: Dumbwaiter Lifts
description: Compact service elevators for transporting goods between floors. Ideal for restaurants, hotels, and hospitals.
